content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Sickle
description: Legendary Sickle is a legendary Psycho class mod. It was added with the Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge and only drops from Tubby enemies in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode at level 62 or higher.
notes:
Below-level-50 versions would show reduced bonuses instead of +5, but cannot be obtained legitimately.

Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge add-on.

Although it is the legendary Sickle, it uses the Meat class mod model.

The red flavour line quotes Walter Sobchak from The Big Lebowski.

special.description:
At maximum level: +61% melee damage.

The standard Sickle is strictly worse than the legendary variant in all stats. Some displays may use the regular Sickle texture to help differentiate it.
special.title: "You're entering a world of pain."
